race.comment: Expecting the Waterhouse-Bott yard to hold the aces. SPANISH ARTIST (3) raced forward and walloped the Kembla Grange Maidens by 3.8L over 1200m on debut. Tackled a 64 at Rosehill over 1400m following and was beaten just 0.9 lengths. Raced a short-priced favourite in both and Clark sticks aboard. Has plenty of upside and can bounce back. Stablemate SUPERFABULISTIC (5) is also heading in the right direction. Spiked his numbers narrowly beaten in a 72 over 1500m at Hawkesbury and has a handy 2kg claim today and a much softer gate. A live chance. ERIN JO (1) jumped at a short quote over 1250m at Newcastle first-up and missed a whisker. Won a Warwick Farm Maiden over 1400m prior as expected and steps up to 1550m today with the tongue tie on for the first time. Collett stays aboard and she's got plenty of scope for improvement. CHISPA (7) peaks with JMac sticking, and she has more to offer. ANGEL CITY (8) has been winning easily and can't be taken lightly.
